'''âdh-k-b''' ('''kadhakab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbase|unbase]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbase|unbase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-k-b
|-
! Lemma
| kadhakab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhakab|thidhakab]] || [[word:jidhakab|jidhakab]] || [[word:shidhakab|shidhakab]] || [[word:kidhakab|kidhakab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhakab|thuthudhakab]] || [[word:jujudhakab|jujudhakab]] || [[word:shushudhakab|shushudhakab]] || [[word:kukudhakab|kukudhakab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhakab|thudhakab]] || [[word:judhakab|judhakab]] || [[word:shudhakab|shudhakab]] || [[word:kudhakab|kudhakab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhakab|thudhakab]] || [[word:judhakab|judhakab]] || [[word:shudhakab|shudhakab]] || [[word:kudhakab|kudhakab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhakab|thedhakab]] || [[word:jedhakab|jedhakab]] || [[word:shedhakab|shedhakab]] || [[word:kedhakab|kedhakab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhakab|thothodhakab]] || [[word:jojodhakab|jojodhakab]] || [[word:shoshodhakab|shoshodhakab]] || [[word:kokodhakab|kokodhakab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakab|thodhakab]] || [[word:jodhakab|jodhakab]] || [[word:shodhakab|shodhakab]] || [[word:kodhakab|kodhakab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakab|thodhakab]] || [[word:jodhakab|jodhakab]] || [[word:shodhakab|shodhakab]] || [[word:kodhakab|kodhakab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhakab|thĂŠdhakab]] || [[word:jĂŠdhakab|jĂŠdhakab]] || [[word:shĂŠdhakab|shĂŠdhakab]] || [[word:kĂŠdhakab|kĂŠdhakab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhakab|thathadhakab]] || [[word:jajadhakab|jajadhakab]] || [[word:shashadhakab|shashadhakab]] || [[word:kakadhakab|kakadhakab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhakab|thadhakab]] || [[word:jadhakab|jadhakab]] || [[word:shadhakab|shadhakab]] || [[word:kadhakab|kadhakab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhakab|thadhakab]] || [[word:jadhakab|jadhakab]] || [[word:shadhakab|shadhakab]] || [[word:kadhakab|kadhakab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhakab|shadhakab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhakab|goshadhakab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhakab|gokishadhakab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhakabnĂŒ|shadhakabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakabnknĂŒ|goshadhakabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakabnĂŒ|gokishadhakabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhakabshĂ«|shadhakabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkshĂ«|goshadhakabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhakabshĂ«|gokishadhakabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakabro|shadhakabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkro|goshadhakabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakabro|gokishadhakabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakabmu|shadhakabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkmu|goshadhakabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakabmu|gokishadhakabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhakabsher|shadhakabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhakabnksher|goshadhakabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhakabsher|gokishadhakabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhakabng|shadhakabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkng|goshadhakabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhakabng|gokishadhakabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhakabya|shadhakabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkya|goshadhakabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhakabya|gokishadhakabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhakabyam|shadhakabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkyam|goshadhakabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhakabyam|gokishadhakabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakabnĂŒshĂ«|shadhakabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhakabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhakabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakabnĂŒro|shadhakabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakabnknĂŒro|goshadhakabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakabnĂŒro|gokishadhakabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakabnĂŒmu|shadhakabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakabnknĂŒmu|goshadhakabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakabnĂŒmu|gokishadhakabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakabshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhakabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhakabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhakabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakabshĂ«ro|shadhakabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkshĂ«ro|goshadhakabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakabshĂ«ro|gokishadhakabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakabshĂ«mu|shadhakabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkshĂ«mu|goshadhakabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakabshĂ«mu|gokishadhakabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakabronĂŒ|shadhakabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkronĂŒ|goshadhakabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakabronĂŒ|gokishadhakabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakabroshĂ«|shadhakabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkroshĂ«|goshadhakabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakabroshĂ«|gokishadhakabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakabromu|shadhakabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkromu|goshadhakabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakabromu|gokishadhakabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakabmunĂŒ|shadhakabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkmunĂŒ|goshadhakabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakabmunĂŒ|gokishadhakabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakabmushĂ«|shadhakabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkmushĂ«|goshadhakabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakabmushĂ«|gokishadhakabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakabmuro|shadhakabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakabnkmuro|goshadhakabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakabmuro|gokishadhakabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
